turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Reporting an Internet Outage at Your Housing

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, my internet is not working today.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hi there, thanks for contacting us today. I’m sorry you’re having trouble with your internet, but don’t worry, I’ll help you check what’s going on. Can you tell me when you first noticed the problem?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: It was working in the morning, but after lunch time, suddenly no internet.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, thank you for explaining that clearly. So it was fine earlier today and then stopped after lunch. That timing is helpful. Are you using Wi-Fi, or are you connected with a cable as well?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I use Wi-Fi, but I also tried cable and still same problem.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that’s very helpful information. If both Wi-Fi and cable aren’t working, it could be a wider connection issue. Let’s check a few basic things together first. Have you already tried restarting your modem or router?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Sorry, modem and router is same thing?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s a great question, and many people ask that. They’re usually two different devices, but sometimes they’re combined into one box. Can you see one box or two boxes near where your internet is set up?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I see two boxes. One small, one little bigger.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, thanks for checking. That means you have a modem and a router. Have you restarted both of them, or just one?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I restarted small one only. I didn’t touch the big one.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem at all, that’s very common. Let’s try restarting the bigger one as well, just to be sure. You can turn it off, wait about 30 seconds, and then turn it back on. Let me know when you’ve done that.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, I will wait.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Take your time, that’s fine. While you’re waiting, I’ll stay here with you. Just tell me when it’s back on.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: It’s back on now. But internet still not working.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thanks for checking that carefully. Since restarting didn’t fix it, let’s look at the lights on the modem. Can you tell me what colour lights you see and whether any are blinking?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: One light is red. Another light is green blinking.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, that’s very useful to know. A red light usually means there’s a connection issue coming from outside your apartment, not something you’ve done wrong.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Does red light mean broken internet?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Not broken permanently, no. It usually just means the service is temporarily down. Once the issue is fixed, the light should return to green.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Ah okay. So it will come back?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, in most cases it does. What I’ll do next is check whether there’s an outage in your building or area. To do that, I’ll need to confirm your address. Is that okay?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. I don’t remember account number. Can I tell address?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s completely fine. An address is enough. Please tell me your full address, including the apartment number.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: It’s 12 King Street, apartment 305.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thank you. Please hold for a moment while I check our system. This might take a few seconds.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thanks for waiting. I can see that there is a reported outage affecting your building at the moment.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Oh really? So many people same problem?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s right. Multiple residents in your building are experiencing the same issue, so it’s not just your apartment.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: When did outage start?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: According to our records, it started around  pm today.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, that is same time for me.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That lines up exactly with what you described earlier, so that confirms it’s a network issue.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: When will it be fixed?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: The current estimate is later tonight. Our technicians are already working on it.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Tonight meaning what time?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good question. Tonight means before midnight.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Before midnight… so maybe 10 or 11 pm?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s a reasonable expectation, although sometimes it can be earlier.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: If not fixed tonight, what should I do?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: If it’s not fixed by tomorrow morning, you can contact us again, and we can either escalate the case or arrange a technician visit.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Technician visit is free?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, it’s free if the issue is on our side, which this one appears to be.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: If problem is my side, I need to pay?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Only if the issue is caused by personal equipment, but based on this outage, that’s very unlikely.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. I think it’s building problem.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, I agree with you. Everything points to a building-wide issue.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Can I ask one more question?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, feel free to ask as many questions as you need.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: If I work from home tomorrow and still no internet, what can I do?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s an important question. If the outage continues, we can provide a written confirmation by email so you can show your employer. We can also advise temporary solutions like mobile data.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Written confirmation meaning email?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, exactly. An email confirming the outage and the repair status.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Can you send me that email?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, I can arrange that now. Let me just confirm your email address. Is the one we have on file still correct?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I’m not sure. Can I tell you again?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, please go ahead.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: It’s laila22@gmail.com.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thank you. I’ll send the confirmation email later today.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. And can I get reference number also?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, definitely. It’s always good to have one. Your reference number is 73942. I’ll say it slowly for you.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Sorry, can you say again slowly?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. Seven… three… nine… four… two.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Seven three nine four two. Correct?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s exactly right.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I will write it down now.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem at all. Take your time.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: If I call again, I say this number?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that will help us find your case quickly.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. Thank you very much for your help today.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome. You explained the problem very clearly, and you did all the right checks. If anything changes or you have more questions, please don’t hesitate to contact us again.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Just confirm, internet will be back tonight, right?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s the current estimate. We’ll keep monitoring it.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. I will wait and check later.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sounds good. I hope it’s resolved soon. Have a good evening, and thanks again for your patience.
